_comment: System-level suite (not a skill in docs/SKILLS.md; check-all runs it as a system-level suite). This is where self-retro corrections that are cross-skill/infrastructure land as permanent checks. The artifact under test is the newest nightly Systems Report -- tools/systems-report/report computes the underlying facts (Plombery failure streaks, expired staleness dismissals) and these checks turn its ALERT lines into exit-2 signal the daily sys-skill-evals job cannot normalize away.

checks.name: no-consecutive-failure-streaks
checks._origin: self-retro 2026-07-02 correction 3 (feedback_dont_normalize_red): mem-librarian ran red 8 straight days unread. A streak ALERT in the nightly report now fails this check until the job is fixed or triaged in writing.

checks.name: no-expired-staleness-dismissals
checks._origin: self-retro 2026-07-02 correction 2 (feedback_stale_verdict_expiry): a non-bug verdict on a quiet source expires; librarian freshness re-ALERTs when a dismissed source is still stale past its expiry and this check fails until re-investigated.
